name: Pasta with Bitter Broccoli
recipeIngredient: 1 1/2 pounds broccoli di rape (bitter broccoli), bunches, trimmed
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the pasta.
2. Combine oil, garlic, and red pepper flakes in a 14" x 11" x 2" dish. Heat uncovered at 100% for 4 minutes.
3. Add broccoli and stir to coat. Cover tightly with plastic wrap. Cook at 100% for 10 minutes.
4. Remove from oven. Uncover and stir well. Add drained pasta and salt, and toss to combine.
5. Serve hot with cheese passed on the side.
